parsed.availability_comment: Recent domestic appearances in 2025-26 indicate he is active; no current suspension/injury absence found for RR fixtures.
parsed.followup_reason: No official RR playing XI confirmation yet; competition from Sandeep Sharma, Yudhvir, Sushant Mishra and overseas quick options keeps role slightly fluid.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Selection battle is within RR’s Indian pace group, not overseas slots.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot cap does not affect selection.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained Indian quick in RR’s core; likely in first-choice seam mix, though exact combination can rotate.
